body:
## Rationale
#1405 (approved) adds `about: Person` to Article JSON-LD for all 62 articles. But **~30 album-focused articles** (e.g. `master-of-puppets-drum-setup`, `rust-in-peace-drum-setup`, `painkiller-drum-setup`) should ALSO link to the `MusicAlbum` entity and its `byArtist: MusicGroup`. This is distinct from #1405 (which adds Person for all articles).

When an AI answers 'what drums were used on Master of Puppets?' it needs:
- Article entity (exists via #1064)
- about: Person (Lars Ulrich — added by #1405)
- about: MusicAlbum + byArtist: MusicGroup ← **this proposal**

This closes the album entity graph for the ~30 album-centric articles in ALBUM_ARTICLES.

## How to identify album articles
`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` entries with slugs matching `*-drum-setup` or `*-setup` patterns (not `whats-in-*` or `*-drum-setup-article`). About 30 entries have an album field or title containing album name.

## Files to touch
- `api/meta/[...path].js` — in the ALBUM_ARTICLES article handler, when article has an `album` field (or slug is album-pattern), add a second `about` value:

```javascript
// In the articleSchema builder, after existing about: Person
const aboutEntities = [{ '@type': 'Person', name: article.drummer.name, ... }];
if (article.album) {
  aboutEntities.push({
    '@type': 'MusicAlbum',
    name: article.album,
    byArtist: { '@type': 'MusicGroup', name: article.band }
  });
}
// articleSchema.about = aboutEntities (or single object if array length 1)
```

Note: Sequence AFTER #1405 ships (same handler, overlapping change).

## Page count
~30 album-focused articles

## Estimated organic uplift
Closes entity graph for album-drum queries ('what drums on Rust in Peace?', 'Megadeth painkiller drummer'). AI knowledge graph traversal: Article → MusicAlbum → MusicGroup. Distinct intent from person-focused articles.

## Verify
1. `curl /api/meta?path=/articles/master-of-puppets-drum-setup` → articleSchema contains `about` with MusicAlbum node
2. MusicAlbum node has `byArtist: {type: MusicGroup, name: 'Metallica'}`
3. Non-album articles (whats-in-lars-ulrichs-kit) do NOT get MusicAlbum node
4. #1405 Person about still present (both should coexist in array)
5. No JSON-LD validation errors (Schema Markup Validator)

## Done
PR merged adding MusicAlbum about-entity to album-focused articles in article SSR handler.
title: SEO batch: Album-focused articles — add MusicAlbum + MusicGroup entity in Article JSON-LD 'about' property (~30 articles)
